title: sutera incisa
intro: Sutera incisa, also known as Sutera torynema, is a flowering plant in the balsam family native to Asia and Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Sutera incisa include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Sutera incisa often involve making infusions, decoctions, or tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
